message:
feat: Add comprehensive tracing instrumentation for cancel propagation

Enhance observability throughout the cancellation subsystem to enable
debugging of complex cancel scenarios:

- Add tracing and tracing-subscriber dependencies
- Instrument cancel_request with debug spans tracking:
  - Target region, cancel kind, cleanup budgets
  - Propagation path through region hierarchy with depth
- Instrument checkpoint() to trace cancel observation/masking
- Propagate cancel_reason to cx_inner for full context access
- Add budget information to task state transition traces

The cancellation system is one of asupersync's most complex subsystems.
These traces provide visibility into:
- When and why cancellation was requested
- How it propagates through region trees
- When tasks observe vs mask cancellation
- Budget inheritance and strengthening

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,8 @@ criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
 futures-lite = "2.6"
 conformance = { package = "asupersync-conformance", path = "conformance" }
 tempfile = "3.17"
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = "0.3"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "phase0_baseline"
